mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_info ( code, symbol, name, market, industry, list_date, is_hs, is_st, total_share, float_share, total_market_cap, float_market_cap, pe_ttm, pb, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{code}, #{symbol}, #{name}, #{market}, #{industry}, #{listDate}, #{isHs}, #{isSt}, #{totalShare}, #{floatShare}, #{totalMarketCap}, #{floatMarketCap}, #{peTtm}, #{pb}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name), market = VALUES(market), industry = VALUES(industry), list_date = VALUES(list_date), is_hs = VALUES(is_hs), is_st = VALUES(is_st), total_share = VALUES(total_share), float_share = VALUES(float_share), total_market_cap = VALUES(total_market_cap), float_market_cap = VALUES(float_market_cap), pe_ttm = VALUES(pe_ttm), pb = VALUES(pb), update_time = VALUES(update_time)
